title: Iris Buttons Everywhere
description: Changes textures of buttons in all menus to Iris Shaders button texture.
body:
This resource pack replaces the startand buttons to buttons from the Iris Shaders!

Future changes:
Compatibility with mods

Current Compatibility:
* Axiom
* Entity Model/Textures Features
* Mod Menu
##    In Options![Resource Pack in Options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cvgApMas/images/ab1d0e0aba8bf6640e059ff568e9aec8f323672f.png)

You can include this resource pack in your modpack without my permission.
